tasks.prompt:
Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: cover.
Image grammar: hook_cover.
Purpose: Compress the article's main idea into one visual system that is understandable in one glance..
Diagram type: stage_evolution.
Concept summary: 这次更新给 Claude Code 和 CodeX 多了一个消息入口，更关键的是把配置动作压到了“自动开网页、扫码即可”。当远程连接从折腾配置变成扫码绑定，试用门槛会明显下降，但它依然更适合轻量协作和即时触发，不适合承接高风险代码操作。.
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: one dominant visual idea, 2-4 large visual nodes max, clear title area, one obvious structure, one focal visual occupying roughly 60-70% area, icon-based metaphor instead of literal screenshots, clean title zone with breathing room, three-stage timeline with transition emphasis, visual momentum from old frame to new frame.
Key relationships to visualize: present one question and one promise, make the article worth clicking in one glance, make the core judgment visible within one glance, show one tension and one payoff only.
Layout pattern: timeline_stage_transition.
Diagram focus: time-shift and logic-shift, not feature listing.
Text position: right.
Text budget: no more than 2 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 16 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 8 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 4 labels.
On-canvas headline: "微信接入不算小修小补，Cla".
On-canvas subheadline: "这次更新给 Claude C".
Grammar rules: This is a hook-first cover, not a summary board. Show one tension or one question and one payoff only. Use 2-4 large visual nodes max. Do not turn the article into a dense chart.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), wide editorial banner, clean empty space, flat shapes with restrained accents, short labels only, prefer conceptual composition over decorative scene rendering, preserve warm off-white background and restrained accent colors.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no photorealism, no dense paragraphs in image, no random sci-fi effects, do not mimic generic social banner aesthetics, avoid full-image text walls or dense annotation.
Additional direction: Make this a hook-first cover. One question or tension, one promise, not a dense summary. Source context: op7418 Style profile: baoyu-cover-image: editorial-infographic (conceptual + warm + hand-drawn). Cover should feel like an editorial infographic hero image with calm hand-drawn confidence. Apply baoyu-cover-image preset editorial-infographic with conceptual composition. Apply hand-drawn organic line quality with controlled imperfection and clean hierarchy. Use warm palette behavior: cream base, warm action accent, cool structure accent. Style profile….
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.

Create a high-quality editorial knowledge graphic for an X Article.
All on-canvas text must be in Simplified Chinese only, except unavoidable product or model names.
Do not use English headings, translated body text, UI labels, or bilingual duplication unless explicitly requested.
Role: inline.
Image grammar: skip_board.
Purpose: Reset attention at the first major section transition and summarize the new concept block..
Diagram type: stage_evolution.
Concept summary: 把 AI 编程助手接到 IM 里，过去听起来像极客玩具；这次更新后，它开始有一点工作流入口的味道了。2026 年 3 月 24 日，@op7418 提到，原本“Claude Code 和 CodeX 远程连接到飞书 IM 的插件 Claude-to-IM-Skills 更新了”….
Style direction: editorial knowledge graphic, warm light background, flat diagram-first composition, mobile legibility first; Use baoyu-cover-image + baoyu-article-illustrator + baoyu-infographic style assets as the default visual language..
Background: warm cream paper-like background.
Primary accents: warm orange, coral red, teal green.
Line work: soft dark gray line work.
Scene elements: 4-6 rejection cards, one strong top verdict, crossed-out or muted examples, rejection cards with crossed-out cues, one top-line verdict and one bottom rule.
Key relationships to visualize: make exclusion easy, support fast scanning and strong judgment.
Layout pattern: rejection_board.
Diagram focus: high-noise areas that should be skipped.
Text position: integrated.
Text budget: no more than 2 major text blocks on the image.
Headline budget: <= 8 Chinese characters.
Subheadline budget: <= 14 Chinese characters.
Label budget: <= 6 Chinese characters per label.
Label count budget: <= 6 labels.
On-canvas headline: "直接跳过".
On-canvas subheadline: "如果它真的重要，过几个月它…".
Grammar rules: Use a strong top verdict and 4-6 rejection cards. This should feel like a fast scan board. No paragraphs. No dense explanation.
Must have: clear information hierarchy, diagram-first composition, short Chinese labels, editorial infographic feeling, high readability on mobile, ample whitespace and one dominant focal structure, flat color blocks with clear line hierarchy, layout-first visual storytelling instead of decorative art, section visuals must map to explicit layout grammar (hub-spoke / linear-progression / comparison-matrix / bento-grid), keep labels short, focus on one concept only, maintain same house style as cover, one image = one clear job, support section transition and comprehension reset.
Must avoid: generic AI wallpaper, cyberpunk neon, photorealistic people, blue digital rain, low-information decoration, busy ornamental textures that reduce readability, style drift between cover and inline images, paragraph-like dense text rendered inside image blocks, no decorative filler, no unrelated icons, no decorative image blocks without structural meaning.
Additional direction: Use the skip_board grammar. This is one visual job, not a paragraph summary: 这次更新给 Claude Code 和 CodeX 多… Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: knowledge-base (infographic + vector-illustration). Inline image should behave like a section explainer card with fast scan value. Style profile: baoyu-article-illustrator: editorial-poster. Design as a reject-board: fast elimination > detailed explanation..
The result should look like a premium creator-made article infographic, not generic AI art.
Keep the composition clean, explanatory, and mobile-legible.
Do not simply render the article's paragraph text into the image.
